summary: Iteration 128: Testing DnD Fix for Planning Board Kanban. The fix correctly separates preventivi into a dedicated state variable (`acceptedPrevs`) and passes them as `prevItems` prop to KanbanColumn. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend DnD works correctly with commessa cards draggable and preventivo cards non-draggable. Found and fixed a bug in POST /api/commesse/from-preventivo endpoint where None values caused TypeError.

from_preventivo_none_values.issue: TypeError when creating commessa from preventivo: `prev.get('notes', '')` returns None when key exists with None value, causing `str.join()` to fail
from_preventivo_none_values.fix: Changed `prev.get('notes', '')` to `(prev.get('notes') or '')` for proper None handling

dnd_fix_separates_preventivi_from_commes.logic: fetchBoard() separates preventivi (is_preventivo=true) into acceptedPrevs state, columns only contain commesse
dnd_fix_separates_preventivi_from_commes.result: PASS - DnD indices are now clean and sequential

board_view_structure.result: PASS - Returns columns with correct structure, preventivi have is_preventivo flag

status_update_patch.result: PASS - Successfully updates status when card is dropped in new column

commessa_cards_draggable.result: PASS - Commessa cards are draggable with GripVertical icon

preventivo_cards_not_draggable.result: PASS - Preventivo cards do NOT have drag handles

preventivo_card_styling.result: PASS - Dashed green border and badge displayed

crea_commessa_button.result: PASS - Button creates commessa and navigates to new commessa page

header_shows_counts.result: PASS - Header correctly shows commesse count and total value

dnd_multiple_status_updates.result: PASS - All status transitions work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend PlanningPage.js: Clean separation of preventivi into acceptedPrevs state ensures Draggable indices are sequential
Backend commesse.py: board/view correctly returns preventivi with is_preventivo flag
Fixed None value handling in _create_single_commessa function for robust preventivo-to-commessa conversion

success_rate.frontend: 100% (DnD, preventivo styling, Crea Commessa button all work)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test commesse and preventivi during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The DnD fix has been verified. Preventivi are now stored in separate `acceptedPrevs` state and passed as `prevItems` prop only to the 'preventivo' column. The `columns` state ONLY contains commesse, ensuring Draggable indices are sequential (0, 1, 2...). Commessa cards have drag handles (GripVertical with cursor-grab), preventivo cards do NOT have drag handles. The POST /api/commesse/from-preventivo endpoint had a bug with None values that was fixed.
